actionCenter.calmMessage: Nothing urgent right now - calm, focused work time.

failed.title: Failed posts or schedules
failed.message: Something didn't publish. Check the logs to see what happened.

readyNotScheduled.message: Polished platform versions waiting on a posting slot.

draftsMissingText.title: Drafts need text
draftsMissingText.message: Some platform drafts are missing required title or caption.

todayReminders.title: Today's reminders
todayReminders.description: Things you asked yourself to handle today.

overdue.title: Overdue
overdue.description: Slipped past their window - clear these first.

needsAttention.title: Needs attention
needsAttention.description: Drafts missing text, ready posts without a slot, failed publishes - fix these to keep moving.

upcomingPosts.title: Upcoming posts
upcomingPosts.description: The next pieces moving toward publish.

recentAttempts.title: Recent publish attempts
recentAttempts.description: Most recent publish actions across every platform.

everythingInOrder.title: Everything is in order
everythingInOrder.description: No drafts, schedules, or reminders need a fix right now.

nothingOverdue.title: Nothing overdue
nothingOverdue.description: You're caught up - nothing slipped past its window.

noRemindersToday.title: No reminders today
noRemindersToday.description: A quiet day. Use it to push something forward.

nothingOnRunway.title: Nothing on the runway
nothingOnRunway.description: Schedule a post from your content library to fill this list.

noPublishAttempts.title: No publish attempts yet
noPublishAttempts.description: Once you publish manually or automatically, recent attempts will show here.

ideas.label: Ideas
ideas.helperEmpty: Fresh sparks waiting to be developed.

ready.label: Ready
ready.helperEmpty: All polished - nothing waiting on you to draft.

publishedThisMonth.label: Published this month
publishedThisMonth.helperEmpty: No failed publish attempts this month.

dashboard.archivedHidden: Archived items hidden from this view: {{count}}

contentLibrary.title: Content Library
contentLibrary.subtitle: Every idea, draft and finished piece - in one quiet place.

error.title: Couldn't load content
error.fallback: We couldn't reach the API just now.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search title, hook, script or notes

empty.filteredDescription: Try widening your search or clearing a filter or two.
empty.noContentDescription: Start with an idea - even a rough one. You can refine it later.

createContent.title: Create Content
createContent.subtitle: Capture a new idea - title and category are all you need to start.

error.title: Couldn't save
error.fallback: We couldn't create this item just now.

quickIdea.title: What is this piece?
quickIdea.description: A title and a category are all you need. Everything else can grow with the idea.
quickIdea.titlePlaceholder: e.g. How I'd architect a side-SaaS in a weekend
quickIdea.hookPlaceholder: The one-line idea that grabs attention.

scriptNotes.title: Script & notes
scriptNotes.description: Optional - outline, full script, references, links.
scriptNotes.notesPlaceholder: Research links, references, talking points, anything sticky.

targetPlatforms.title: Target platforms
targetPlatforms.description: Pick where this will live. Each platform gets its own draft.
targetPlatforms.label: Target platforms
targetPlatforms.hint: Optional - you can add platforms later.
targetPlatforms.applyNote: Updates target platforms only. Title, hook, script, notes, and hashtags stay as written.

categoryGuidance.title: Category guidance
categoryGuidance.description: Defaults you can lean on while drafting.
categoryGuidance.emptyDescription: Pick a category to see saved goal, hook style, caption style, and default platforms.

items.contentItem: A new Content Item is created in your library.
items.platformPosts: For each selected platform, a draft Platform Post is spun up.
items.details: From the details page you can upload media, refine captions, and schedule.

footer.ideaStatus: New item will be saved as an idea
